name: matt-marketplace
description: Matt Prabu's personal Claude Code skill collection. Install skills individually.

plugins.name: analyze-property
plugins.description: Analyzes a single US residential property — valuation, comps, scoring, and investment snapshot.

plugins.name: book-formatter
plugins.description: Formats written prose into professional book layout with front matter, headings, and typography.

plugins.name: bytebytego-explainer
plugins.description: Transforms any technical topic into a ByteByteGo-style visual explanation with diagrams and layered depth.

plugins.name: nb2-img-prompt
plugins.description: Generates optimized, safety-compliant image prompts for Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion.

plugins.name: resume-builder
plugins.description: Comprehensive resume creation, revision, and tailoring for specific job postings.

plugins.name: screen-properties
plugins.description: Bulk-screens multiple US residential properties and ranks them by investment potential.
